---
title: "Health & Well-being"
title-block-banner: "#2A7F9E"
title-block-banner-color: "#F7F4EE"
body-classes: area-health
---

![](../visual_assets/brand/botanical/solid/leaf-display-lake.svg){.overview-leaf fig-alt="The Canada Observatory leaf in the Health & Well-being colour"}

How long and how well Canadians live, how their health-care system performs, and how satisfied they are with life — against a broad group of OECD peers.

::::{.columns}

:::{.column .area-card .area-health width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-health.svg){.area-banner}

### [Health of Canadians](index.qmd)
Life expectancy and its recent decline, and population health and risk factors —
suicide, overweight, diabetes, vaccination, and more.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-health width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-health.svg){.area-banner}

### [The Health-Care System](health-care-system.qmd)
Health spending and capacity — beds, physicians, nurses, MRI units — plus
pharmaceutical spending, access, and wait times.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-health width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-health.svg){.area-banner}

### [Substance Use](substance-use.qmd)
Tobacco, alcohol and cannabis by age, and Canada's opioid- and toxic-drug crisis.
:::

::::

::::{.columns}

:::{.column .area-card .area-health width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-health.svg){.area-banner}

### [Well-being](../wellbeing/index.qmd)
Life satisfaction and the factors that underlie it, compared with peers.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column width="32%"}
:::

::::
